name: Sparinvest Value Aktier KL
summary: SparInvest Value Aktier KL is an equity mutual fund launched and managed by Sparinvest Fond√É¬¶glerselskab A/S. It invests in the public equity markets of the Nordic countries, Japan, Southern Europe, the United Kingdom, and North America. The fund invests in stocks of companies operating across diversified sectors. It was formerly known as SparInvest Value Aktier. SparInvest Value Aktier KL is domiciled in Denmark.
